name: airlift
description: Model- and harness-agnostic session handoff for usage caps, rate limits, checkpoints, and resume workflows across Claude Code, Codex, DeepSeek, Gemini, Kiro, and OpenCode.

skills.name: Airlift
skills.description: Model- and harness-agnostic session handoff for checkpoints, usage caps, rate limits, and resume in another model workflows.

commands.name: Airlift Out
commands.description: Create or refresh a .airlift handoff bundle from the current session (default no-commit patch capture).

commands.name: Airlift In
commands.description: Resume from an existing .airlift handoff bundle in the current harness.

commands.name: Airlift Install
commands.description: Wire, unwire, or check the airlift Tier-3 early-warning monitor in settings.json (statusLine chain + StopFailure hook). Preserves the existing statusLine; ccusage optional.

interface.shortDescription: Model- and harness-agnostic session handoff for usage caps, rate limits, checkpoints, and resume workflows across Claude
interface.longDescription: Model- and harness-agnostic session handoff for usage caps, rate limits, checkpoints, and resume workflows across Claude Code, Codex, DeepSeek, Gemini, Kiro, and OpenCode.
